name: New Vegetable Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 10 oz chopped spinach, thawed and drained
14 ½ oz cans tomatoes, drained and chopped
¼ cup Burgundy or dry red wine
1 ¼ cups (5 oz) shredded part-skim mozzarella
recipeInstructions:
1. Press spinach between paper towels.
2. Combine spinach, cottage cheese, and egg whites in a medium bowl. Stir well. Set aside.
3. Coat a large, non-stick saucepan with cooking spray; add oil and place over medium-high heat until hot.
4. Add onion and sauté 3 minutes or until tender.
5. Add mushrooms and garlic; sauté 2 minutes or until mushrooms are tender.
6. Add tomatoes, parsley, red wine, tomato paste, basil, oregano, brown sugar, pepper, and salt. Stir well.
7. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 20 minutes. Remove from heat.
8. Coat a 12 x 8 x 2 inch baking dish with cooking spray.
9. Spoon one-third of the tomato mixture into the baking dish.
10. Arrange 3 noodles lengthwise in a single layer over the tomato mixture.
11. Top with 1 ¼ cups spinach mixture.
12. Layer 2 ½ cups zucchini over the spinach.
13. Sprinkle with ½ cup mozzarella.
14. Repeat layers; top with remaining tomato mixture.
15. Cover and refrigerate for 9 hours.
16. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
17. Uncover and sprinkle with remaining ¼ cup mozzarella cheese and Parmesan.
18. Let stand 5 minutes before serving.
